sandbox.name: sandbox_root
sandbox.role: Forced working-directory root for all executer subprocess commands.

checklists.name: planner_get_checklists
checklists.role: Generates target-specific checklist candidates for planner and executer workflow alignment.

checklists.name: planner_set_checklist
checklists.role: Normalizes and finalizes checklist output after planning.

checklists.name: checklist_sources
checklists.role: Authoritative checklist-source registry by target type.

wordlists.name: dns_subdomains_short
wordlists.role: Fast DNS subdomain brute-force for warmup and low-noise recon. Max 1000 items.

wordlists.name: dns_subdomains_medium
wordlists.role: Broader DNS subdomain enumeration when short list is exhausted. Max 3000 items.

wordlists.name: dns_subdomains_large
wordlists.role: Large DNS brute-force list for deeper recon passes. Max 8000 items.

wordlists.name: web_files_short
wordlists.role: Short web file names for fast content discovery.

wordlists.name: web_files_medium
wordlists.role: Medium web file names list for content discovery.

wordlists.name: web_files_large
wordlists.role: Large web file names list for deep content discovery passes.

wordlists.name: web_folders_short
wordlists.role: Short web directory names for fast content discovery.

wordlists.name: web_folders_medium
wordlists.role: Medium web directory names list for content discovery.

wordlists.name: web_folders_large
wordlists.role: Large web directory names list for deep content discovery passes.

seclists.name: passwords_short
seclists.role: Short common-password list for fast and cautious credential testing.

seclists.name: passwords_medium
seclists.role: Medium password list for standard credential brute-force.

seclists.name: passwords_large
seclists.role: Large password list for deep auth testing without timing out.

seclists.name: usernames_short
seclists.role: Short username shortlist for focused auth checks.

seclists.name: usernames_medium
seclists.role: Medium username list for standard login checks.

seclists.name: usernames_large
seclists.role: Large username list for deeper auth assessments.

seclists.name: common_web_content_short
seclists.role: Short common web content discovery list for quick file brute-forcing.

seclists.name: common_web_content_medium
seclists.role: Medium common web content discovery list.

seclists.name: common_web_content_large
seclists.role: Large common web content discovery list for exhaustive searches.
